original_statement: number of consecutive years she finished in top 10
mutated_statement: number of consecutive years she did something in some place
mutation_analysis: Action verb replacement + Specificity generalization: "finished" → "did something" | achievement/ranking "in top 10" → vague location/phrase "in some place" (number of consecutive years she finished in top 10 → number of consecutive years she did something in some place)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）依据judge_thought中的内容："Explanation: The years listed... The longest consecutive sequence... which totals 3 consecutive years. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 3 is correct."，未见任何提及歧义或澄清的词语；（2）代理人直接按照自身理解提取年份、去重并计算最长连续序列，给出具体答案3，未提出疑问或假设说明；（3）归类理由：代理人没有识别到变异问题中动词替换与模糊化带来的不确定性，未请求更多信息或标注假设，表现为将不明确的指令当作明确任务处理，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”。
